cmd:
bash -c 
export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1
export USE_HIP=1
cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/brian2cuda/src

# Run a simple test that generates and compiles HIP code with synapses
python -c "
from brian2 import *
import brian2cuda
set_device(\"cuda_standalone\", build_on_run=False)

# Create a network with synapses to test spike queue code
eqs = \"dv/dt = -v/(10*ms) : 1\"
G = NeuronGroup(100, eqs, threshold=\"v>0.5\", reset=\"v=0\", method=\"linear\")
G.v = \"rand()\"
S = Synapses(G, G, on_pre=\"v_post += 0.1\", delay=1*ms)
S.connect(p=0.1)
run(1*ms)
device.build(directory=\"/tmp/brian2cuda_wave64_test\", compile=True, run=True, clean=True)
"
